items.name: 491-S26-TOO-MANY-COOKS
items.description: The practical capstone version of GAME491 gives senior-level GAME students the opportunity to apply their learned skills in programming, art, game design, and other disciplines to a long-term, team based game development project that aims to emulate real world game development practices in a classroom setting.

items.description: Carrom Game is an interactive web-based recreation of the classic board game, developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It features smooth gameplay, responsive design, and real-time interactions, showcasing game development and UI skills in a browser environment.
